title: iria nutans
intro: Iria nutans, also known as the Iria plant, is a flowering plant species within the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Iria nutans include its ability to relieve symptoms associated with respiratory infections, and it has been used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments, including fever and fatigue. Iria nutans can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
